name: @neosapience/typecast-autotag
description: Text preprocessing SDK for Typecast TTS API - automatically converts phone numbers, dates, names, and other patterns into speech-friendly formats for AICC environments

scripts.test: pnpm test:jest && pnpm test:e2e && pnpm test:python && pnpm test:java
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm c-binding:bundle && pnpm c-binding:build-all-multiarch && tsx c-binding/scripts/e2e/index.ts --all-multiarch
scripts.test:e2e:linux: pnpm c-binding:bundle && pnpm c-binding:build-linux && tsx c-binding/scripts/e2e/index.ts
scripts.test:e2e:linux-multiarch: pnpm c-binding:bundle && pnpm c-binding:build-linux-multiarch && tsx c-binding/scripts/e2e/index.ts --linux-multiarch
scripts.test:e2e:windows: pnpm c-binding:bundle && pnpm c-binding:build-windows && tsx c-binding/scripts/e2e/index.ts --windows
scripts.test:e2e:windows-multiarch: pnpm c-binding:bundle && pnpm c-binding:build-windows-multiarch && tsx c-binding/scripts/e2e/index.ts --windows-multiarch
scripts.test:e2e:macos: pnpm c-binding:bundle && pnpm c-binding:build-macos && tsx c-binding/scripts/e2e/index.ts --macos
scripts.setup: pnpm install && pnpm build && pnpm c-binding:all
scripts.c-binding:build-linux: cd c-binding && docker build -t typecast-autotag-builder -f Dockerfile.build . && docker run --rm -v $(pwd)/build:/output typecast-autotag-builder
scripts.c-binding:build-windows: cd c-binding && docker build -t typecast-autotag-builder-windows -f Dockerfile.build.windows . && docker run --rm -v $(pwd)/build:/output typecast-autotag-builder-windows
scripts.c-binding:build-all: pnpm c-binding:build-linux && pnpm c-binding:build-windows && pnpm c-binding:build-macos && pnpm sync:libs
scripts.c-binding:build-all-multiarch: pnpm c-binding:build-linux-multiarch && pnpm c-binding:build-windows-multiarch && pnpm c-binding:build-macos && pnpm sync:libs
scripts.c-binding:all: pnpm c-binding:duktape && pnpm c-binding:bundle && pnpm c-binding:build
scripts.python-binding:build: pnpm sync:version && pnpm python-binding:copy-libs && cd python-binding && ./scripts/build.sh
scripts.java-binding:build: pnpm sync:version && pnpm java-binding:copy-libs && cd java-binding && mvn clean package -DskipTests -Dmaven.javadoc.skip=true

author: typecast
